title: Information creates new elements and shows up in stairs
excerpt:
i am trying to use mirror to export multiple boards into a single board but the information comes out in stairs, and it creates multiple elements! 
Is there a way for it to only create one element and accomodate the diff…

posts.author: AndreaRendon (Andrea Rendon)
posts.cookedHtml:
i am trying to use mirror to export multiple boards into a single board but the information comes out in stairs, and it creates multiple elements!
Is there a way for it to only create one element and accomodate the different dates
